name: pageloop
label: PageLoop Comments
description: Drop-in commenting / annotation layer (PageLoop) for your public site.
author: SiteSurge

configSchema.label: Storage mode
configSchema.help: remote: connect to a hosted/self-hosted PageLoop server. local-sqlite: point at a locally-run PageLoop server (pageloop go) using SQLite.

configSchema.label: PageLoop server endpoint
configSchema.help: The PageLoop backend that stores comments and serves data + the widget bundle.

configSchema.label: Project ID / slug
configSchema.help: The PageLoop project this site's comments belong to.

configSchema.label: Allow public commenting
configSchema.help: If off, only signed-in users may comment (enforced by your PageLoop project).

configSchema.label: Show only to signed-in admins
configSchema.help: When on, the widget renders only for logged-in admins; otherwise it shows for all visitors.
